subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by God in the prison of 'Akká unto him who hath turned unto Him, hearkened and answered his All-Powerful Lord. By My life, whensoever it appeareth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الله فی سجن عکا لمن اقبل و سمع و اجاب مولیه القدیر لعمری کلما تظهر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
